name: Blueberry Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the softened margarine with the flour and add up to 70 ml of cold water. Form this mixture into a ball and let it rest in a cool place for 15 minutes.
2. Butter and lightly flour a 25 cm tall tin with a removable base.
3. Roll out the pastry dough and line the prepared tin.
4. Mix the 25g caster sugar with the 50g icing sugar and spread over the bottom of the pastry case.
5. Fill the case with blueberries, dotting them with the margarine.
6. Preheat the oven to 240°C (480°F).
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and dust with the remaining icing sugar.
9. Serve warm.
